desc.en: An up-to-date libretro port of the venerable Game Boy Advance emulator, VisualBoy Advance-Merged. In addition to Game Boy Advance, this core also supports Game Boy, Game Boy Color and Super Game Boy (borders and palette, only). Most users should start with this VBA-M core and only fall back to the older VBA-Next core if they need the additional performance boost at the cost of reduced accuracy and compatibility.
desc.zh: [VBA-M] 是经典 GBA 模拟器 VisualBoy Advance-Merged (VBA-M) 的最新 Libretro 移植版。除了 Game Boy Advance 外，该核心还支持 Game Boy、Game Boy Color 以及 Super Game Boy（仅支持边框和调色板）。建议大多数用户首先使用此 VBA-M 核心，只有在因设备性能不足、愿意牺牲精度和兼容性以换取速度时，才考虑回退到较旧的 VBA-Next 核心。

notes: GBA core. Analog stick can be used for tilt/gyro sensors in certain games, but not implemented in current version.
